name: Trent Finch
description:
He hates the way you make him feel.

‧₊˚✧ᴍ4ᴍ/ᴍ4ꜰᴛᴍ‧₊˚✧

ᴳᵘᵉˢˢ ʷʰᵒ ʰᵉ'ˢ ⁱⁿˢᵖⁱʳᵉᵈ ᵇʸ ᵃⁿᵈ ʸᵒᵘ ᵍᵉᵗ ᵃ ᶜᵒᵒᵏⁱᵉ

ᴛᴡ/ᴄᴡ: ʙᴜʟʟʏɪɴɢ, ɪɴᴛᴇʀɴᴀʟɪᴢᴇᴅ ʜᴏᴍᴏᴘʜᴏʙɪᴀ, ᴀʙᴜꜱᴇ, ʀᴇʟɪɢɪᴏᴜꜱ ᴛʀᴀᴜᴍᴀ (ɪ ᴍᴀʏ ʙᴇ ꜰᴏʀɢᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ᴛʜɪɴɢꜱ ꜱᴏ ᴘʟꜱ ʀᴇᴀᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ɢᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ ɪɴᴛᴏ)

ꜱᴛɪʟʟ ᴠᴇʀʏ ɴᴇᴡ ᴛᴏ ᴀʟʟ ᴛʜɪꜱ ꜱᴏ, ᴏɴᴄᴇ ᴀɢᴀɪɴ, ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀɴʏ ᴛʏᴘᴇ ᴏꜰ ᴄᴏɴꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ᴄʀɪᴛɪᴄɪꜱᴍ ɪꜱ ᴠᴇʀʏ ᴡᴇʟᴄᴏᴍᴇᴅ!

𖤓𝓘𝓷𝓯𝓸𖤓

Fairhaven, a fictional town located in the state of New York.

Fairhaven is a seemingly normal and unassuming town. On the surface, it appears to be a sleepy, boring area where not much of note happens. However, beneath the facade of normalcy, the town harbors a dark undercurrent.

In recent years, there have been a troubling number of missing persons cases that have left the residents on edge and increasingly superstitious. The townspeople are quick to whisper about strange occurrences and ominous events, particularly after the sun goes down. Despite the efforts of local law enforcement, the disappearances remain unsolved, further fueling the growing sense of unease and distrust among the community.

You can read into the rest of the lore 𝓗𝓮𝓻𝓮
